title: Cardiac Action Potential Simulator
description: Numerical simulation of ventricular action potentials using the ten Tusscher–Noble–Noble–Panfilov model. Explores how ion channel conductances affect arrhythmia onset.

title: EEG Artifact Removal Pipeline
description: Automated pipeline for removing ocular and muscular artifacts from EEG recordings using ICA decomposition and wavelet thresholding in MATLAB/Simulink.

title: Glucose–Insulin PK/PD Model
description: Pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic model of glucose–insulin dynamics under meal perturbations. Fitted to clinical data and used to simulate type-2 diabetes progression.

title: Tumor Growth ML Predictor
description: Supervised learning models trained on synthetic tumor growth data to predict patient response to chemotherapy. Compares regression baselines against gradient boosting and neural surrogates.
